---
title: "verify_env.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\verify_env.py"
loc: 22
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.50
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.78
---

## Intent
The `verify_env.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on verify. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via verify. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)

### Exports
- `verify`
